repo.name: sourcetrail
setup: No dependency setup is required for read-only benchmark inspection.

prompt: Explain how Sourcetrail turns project/source-group configuration into indexing work, then how indexed data is accessed by the application. Cite the source files that support the path.

expected_symbols.name: Project::buildIndex
expected_symbols.why: Builds the indexing task pipeline for project source groups.

expected_symbols.name: TaskFillIndexerCommandsQueue
expected_symbols.why: Defines the task that queues indexer commands during the project build-index task flow; Project::buildIndex covers the callsite.

expected_symbols.name: SourceGroupCxxCdb
expected_symbols.why: Loads compile database input and creates C/C++ indexer commands.

expected_symbols.name: IndexerCommandCxx
expected_symbols.why: Represents C/C++ indexer command work emitted by C++ source groups.

expected_symbols.name: IndexerJava
expected_symbols.why: Executes Java indexing through the Java parser.

expected_symbols.name: StorageAccessProxy
expected_symbols.why: Delegates storage calls to the active storage subject.

expected_symbols.name: PersistentStorage
expected_symbols.why: Concrete persistent implementation of storage access.

expected_claims.text: Project::buildIndex builds a per-source-group indexing task pipeline before merge and injection work.
SourceGroupCxxCdb reads compile database input and emits IndexerCommandCxx work for C and C++ files.
IndexerJava delegates Java command execution into JavaParser build-index behavior.
StorageAccess is the application-facing storage contract and PersistentStorage implements it.
StorageAccessProxy forwards storage calls to the active storage subject rather than owning persistence itself.

forbidden_claims.text: Sourcetrail only indexes Java and does not have a C/C++ compile database source-group path.
StorageAccessProxy is the persistent SQLite storage implementation.
Project::buildIndex directly parses source files instead of building indexing tasks.

notes: Local-real task for the user-requested sibling checkout. This is not public promotion evidence unless rerun against a pinned clean checkout with repeated paired rows.
